text.title: Puppeteer Patterns
text.summary: Launch options, element selection, screenshots/PDF, cookie management, and request interception.

rule.statement: Always pass --no-sandbox, --disable-dev-shm-usage, and --disable-gpu in containerized/CI environments; never run without these in Docker.
rule.rationale: Docker containers lack sandbox support; without these flags Chromium crashes on launch in restricted environments.
